explain.invite_bulk.text: Paste any text containing email addresses: commas, new lines or address-book dumps all work. Invited members will receive an email to accept the invitation.
invite_bulk_link: Click here if you want to invite students in bulk using copy-paste.
onboarding_completed.text: Have a look around to explore the features of {{appName}}.
onboarding_demo_ready.text: Have a look around to explore what you can do with this template already.
onboarding_welcome.text: 🚀 This is the Cella template itself (no content). What will you build?
paste_emails.placeholder: Paste any text containing email addresses...
paste_emails.text: Email addresses are extracted automatically; one role applies to the whole batch.
